description: A list of search results matching the query criteria.
name: SearchListResponse

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#searchListResponse.

nextPageToken.description: The token for the next page of results.

prevPageToken.description: The token for the previous page of results.

regionCode.description: The region code that was used for the search query.

pageInfo.description: Paging details for a list operation, including information about the total number of resources and the number per page.

totalResults.description: The total number of results in the result set.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in the API response.

items.description: A list of results that match the search criteria.
A search result contains information about a YouTube video, channel, or playlist that matches the search query.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#searchResult.

id.description: The id object contains information that can be used to uniquely identify the resource that matches the search request.

kind.description: The type of the API resource.

videoId.description: If the id.kind property's value is youtube#video, then this property is present.

channelId.description: If the id.kind property's value is youtube#channel, then this property is present.

playlistId.description: If the id.kind property's value is youtube#playlist, then this property is present.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about a search result, such as its title or description.

publishedAt.description: The creation date and time of the resource that the search result identifies.

channelId.description: The value that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the channel that published the resource identified by the search result.

title.description: The title of the search result.

description.description: A description of the search result.

thumbnails.description: A map of thumbnail images associated with the search result.

channelTitle.description: The title of the channel that published the resource identified by the search result.

liveBroadcastContent.description: An indication of whether a video or channel resource has live broadcast content.
